zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean LeClerc於1527年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲時，他的父親Jacques Leclerc37歲，母親Michelle Le Caignoncle27歲。他和Jenna Lippensen至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1560年在法國享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean LeClerc于1527年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲时，他的父亲Jacques Leclerc37岁，母亲Michelle Le Caignoncle27岁。他和Jenna Lippensen至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1560年在法国享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: LeClerc
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Jacques, Normand, Adrien, Alain, Gilles, Laurier, Serge, Cecile, Colette, Francois.

French and Walloon: occupational or status name for a member of a minor religious order or for a scholar, a variant of French Clerc , with fused masculine definite article le. Compare Leclair and Leclere .

variants.name: Leclercq
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Francois, Honore, Jacques, Laurent, Lucien, Toussaint.
French (mainly northern) and Walloon: variant of   Leclerc  .

variants.name: Clerc
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Odette, Sebastien, Serge.

French: occupational or status name for a member of a minor religious order or for a scholar, Old French clerc, from Late Latin clericus, from Greek klērikos, a derivative of klēros ‘inheritance, legacy’, with reference to the priestly tribe of Levites (see Levy ) ‘whose inheritance was the Lord’. In medieval Christian Europe, clergy in minor orders were permitted to marry and so found families; thus the surname could become established. In the Middle Ages it was virtually only members of religious orders who learned to read and write, so that the term clerc later came to denote any literate man, a scholar (hence its modern meaning ‘scribe, secretary’ or ‘clerk’). Compare Leclerc .

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean LeClerc was born in 1527, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, his father, Jacques Leclerc, was 37 and his mother, Michelle Le Caignoncle, was 27. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Jenna Lippensen. He died in 1560, in France, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean LeClerc est né en 1527, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, son père, Jacques Leclerc, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Michelle Le Caignoncle, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Jenna Lippensen. Il est décédé en 1560, à France, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean LeClerc 1527 in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jacques Leclerc 37 und seine Mutter Michelle Le Caignoncle 27. Er hatte mit Jenna Lippensen mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1560 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean LeClerc è nato il nel 1527 nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Jacques Leclerc, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Michelle Le Caignoncle, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Jenna Lippensen. Morì nel 1560, nel Francia, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean LeClercが1527年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで生まれた時，父Jacques Leclercは37歳，母Michelle Le Caignoncleは27歳であった。彼はJenna Lippensenとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1560年にフランスで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean LeClerc(이)가 1527년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jacques Leclerc(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Michelle Le Caignoncle(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Jenna Lippensen(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1560년 프랑스에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean LeClerc nasceu em 1527, em Paris, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Jacques Leclerc, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Michelle Le Caignoncle, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Jenna Lippensen. Ele faleceu em 1560, em França, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean LeClerc родился в 1527 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Jacques Leclerc было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Michelle Le Caignoncle, 27. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Jenna Lippensen. Он умер в 1560 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean LeClerc nació en 1527, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Jacques Leclerc, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Michelle Le Caignoncle, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Jenna Lippensen. Murió en 1560, en Francia, a la edad de 33 años.
